---
title: "Hon. Andalusia Laura Charlotte Georgina Riley"
---

## Hon. Andalusia Laura Charlotte Georgina Riley

**Dates:** (d.1912)

**Maiden name:** (Molesworth)

### Description

wife of [[person:1239]J. A. L. Riley]

### Biography

She married Riley in 1887.

### Letters

- Letter from April 21st [1893]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
